topic: Perplexity AI search methodology, answer synthesis patterns

entries.a: Vane is a privacy-focused AI answering engine that runs entirely on your own hardware.

entries.q: What are the key features of Vane?
entries.a: Vane features include support for local LLMs and cloud providers, smart search modes, cited sources, and privacy-focused web search powered by SearxNG.
Vane can be installed using Docker or without Docker. Using Docker is highly recommended as it simplifies the setup process.

entries.q: What is SearxNG and how is it related to Vane?
entries.a: SearxNG is a search engine that Vane uses to power its web search functionality. Vane can be used with a bundled SearxNG instance or with an existing SearxNG installation.

entries.q: Can I use Vane with my own SearxNG instance?
entries.a: Yes, you can use Vane with your own SearxNG instance by configuring the SEARXNG_API_URL environment variable.

entries.q: What are the benefits of using Vane?
entries.a: Vane provides accurate answers with cited sources while keeping your searches completely private, making it a great option for those who value privacy and accuracy.

entries.q: How can I configure my AI provider settings in Vane?
entries.a: You can configure your AI provider settings in the setup screen at http://localhost:3000 after installing and running Vane.
Yes, Vane is an open-source project, and its development is powered by the generous support of its sponsors.
